scripts.build:api-stack: bun run --filter @rp-platform/api-contracts build && bun run --filter @rp-platform/domain build && bun run --filter @rp-platform/prompt-pipeline build && bun run --filter @rp-platform/db build && bun run --filter @rp-platform/import-export build && bun run --filter @rp-platform/api build
scripts.dev:api: bun run build:api-stack && bun run --filter @rp-platform/api dev
